2606.11164.title: ReasonAlloc: Hierarchical Decoding-Time KV Cache Budget Allocation for Reasoning Models
2606.11164.paper_summary: Long chain-of-thought (CoT) trajectories in large language model (LLM) reasoning cause severe inference bottlenecks due to rapid key-value (KV) cache growth. Current decoding-time compression methods mitigate this issue via token eviction, but typically assume a uniform budget distribution across all layers and heads. In contrast, existing non-uniform budget allocation methods are predominantly designed for the static prompt prefill phase, and they do not capture the stepwise context demands of autoregressive reasoning. To bridge this gap, we propose ReasonAlloc, a training-free framework that recasts decoding-time KV compression as a hierarchical budget allocation problem. ReasonAlloc operates at two complementary levels: an offline layer-wise preallocation strategy captures an architecture-driven demand pattern which we call ``\textit{Reasoning Wave}'', while an online head-wise strategy reallocates resources during decoding to information-rich heads based on real-time utility. Evaluations on mathematical reasoning benchmarks (MATH-500, AIME~2024) using DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B, and AceReason-14B show that ReasonAlloc outperforms uniform-budget R-KV, SnapKV, and Pyramid-RKV (a baseline enforcing a static, monotonically decreasing layer budget), with the largest gains at small budgets (128-512 tokens). ReasonAlloc is plug-and-play with existing token-eviction policies and introduces negligible inference-time overhead.
2606.11164.paper_summary_zh: 長鏈思考（CoT）軌跡在大型語言模型（LLM）推理中造成嚴重的推理瓶頸，這是由於快速的鍵值（KV）快取增長所致。當前的解碼時間壓縮方法通過令牌驅逐來緩解這一問題，但通常假設所有層和頭的預算分配是均勻的。相比之下，現有的非均勻預算分配方法主要是為靜態提示預填充階段設計的，並且無法捕捉自回歸推理的逐步上下文需求。為了彌補這一差距，我們提出了ReasonAlloc，一個無需訓練的框架，將解碼時間的KV壓縮重新構建為一個層次預算分配問題。ReasonAlloc在兩個互補的層面上運作：離線的層級預分配策略捕捉了一種我們稱之為“\textit{推理波}”的架構驅動需求模式，而在線的頭級策略則根據實時效用在解碼過程中重新分配資源到信息豐富的頭。使用DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B、DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B和AceReason-14B在數學推理基準（MATH-500、AIME~2024）上的評估顯示，ReasonAlloc的表現超過了均勻預算的R-KV、SnapKV和Pyramid-RKV（這是一個強制靜態、單調遞減層預算的基線），在小預算（128-512個令牌）時獲得了最大的增益。ReasonAlloc與現有的令牌驅逐政策兼容，並且引入的推理時間開銷微乎其微。
2606.11164.author: Wenhao Liu et.al.
2606.11164.authors: Wenhao Liu, Hao Shi, Yunhe Li, Weizhi Fei, Xiangyuan Wang, Mengzhe Ruan, Hanxu Hou, Peisong Wang, Linqi Song, Shuang Qiu
